ogTitle: Telangatuk East vs Telford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Telangatuk East and Telford.
heading: Telangatuk East vs Telford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Telangatuk East, Victoria and Telford, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Telford has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Telangatuk East (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Telangatuk East or Telford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Telangatuk East has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Telford scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Telangatuk East scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Telford scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Telangatuk East or Telford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Telford has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
